repo.description: Marketing site for MonGPT, an AI support agent offering multilingual chat and voice support targeting Asian markets. Static Next.js export on Cloudflare Pages with edge geo-locale redirects, 25+ free SEO tools, and localized docs across 9 languages.

cards.title: Add security headers to edge middleware
cards.rationale: Middleware only geo-redirects — no CSP, X-Frame-Options, or X-Content-Type-Options anywhere.
bullets: Inject CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options on all responses
Wrap next() response with headers in functions/_middleware.js
Zero UX impact, immediate hardening against clickjacking and MIME sniffing

cards.title: Add mobile hamburger menu navigation
cards.rationale: Header hides nav links below md breakpoint with no mobile fallback — visitors are stranded.
bullets: Add slide-out drawer menu to Header.tsx for screens below md
Expose Features, Voice, Pricing, Tools, Docs links on mobile
Reuse existing locale switcher and auth buttons in drawer

cards.title: Add test infrastructure for tool components
cards.rationale: Zero test files exist — converter and generator logic is completely untested.
bullets: Add vitest and @testing-library/react to package.json devDependencies
Unit-test toMarkdown conversion functions (html, csv, json, xml)
Component-test ConverterTool paste flow and GeneratorTool API interaction

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages
cards.rationale: No 'MonGPT vs Intercom/Tidio' pages — bottom-funnel comparison search traffic is untapped.
bullets: Create /compare/[slug]/ pages for Intercom, Tidio, Crisp, Tawk.to
Reuse DocsLayout sidebar for feature-by-feature comparison tables
Add compare links to Footer tool mesh for sitewide link equity

cards.title: Add interactive product demo page
cards.rationale: No way to try the chatbot without signup — a guided demo closes that conversion gap.
bullets: Build /demo/ page with embedded chat preview using ChatWithSource component
Add step-by-step tour highlighting multilingual and voice features
Include signup CTA after demo interaction completes

cards.title: Add Shopify integration landing page
cards.rationale: WordPress page exists but no Shopify — a top e-commerce platform in target Asian markets.
bullets: Create /shopify/ page mirroring existing /wordpress/ page structure
Target 'AI chatbot for Shopify' and 'Shopify customer support' queries
Add to Footer product links alongside existing WordPress link
